{{Infobox character
| name = Divide
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]] is an entity [[Shadow Ark]] does not want to deal with.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]] is an adaptive power of the [[Zenith Blade]] that grants abilities based on the user's chosen opponent.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]] is a character who has boarded a different ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]]'s [[sword]] dissolved when he sighed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I don’t want to deal with Divide, all right?” Ark said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Divide and his new human boarded a different ship than the one we’re on. They’re taking us somewhere, but it’s impossible to tell where.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
